title: Prescription not applicable
doc_html:
§226.  Prescription not applicable

Prescription does not run against immovable property or rights thereto legally acquired by the department for use as right of way for public highways or facilities.  

Amended by Acts 1977, No. 291, §1.
doc_text:
§226.  Prescription not applicable
Prescription does not run against immovable property or rights thereto legally acquired by the department for use as right of way for public highways or facilities.
Amended by Acts 1977, No. 291, §1.
